items.title: Cathie Wood Space Fund Buys This Dow Stock, Trims Its Largest Holding
items.description: The fund added shares of a pair of industrial giants with space-related businesses whose stocks have been slumping.

items.title: All You Need to Know About Honeywell International (HON) Rating Upgrade to Buy
items.description: Honeywell International (HON) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
